data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate the ability to filter by location/resource/time window regardless of source domain is not directly evidenced in the provided data. While the linked use case mentions this need, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality is implemented or operational. Therefore, the evidence does not confirm requirement coverage or capture a precise gap, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of filtering by location/resource/time window regardless of source domain.
